items.name: Peaky Blinders Pose (Dynamic Head)

This emote has FACIAL ANIMATION (the Roblox preview is just glitched).

Real bosses don't need to speak. 🤫 Stand tall with your hands behind your back and let your presence do the talking. The ultimate quiet and intimidating idle pose for when you are plotting your next big move.

Sigma. Gangster. Hood. Idle. Standing. Boss. Mafia. Suit. Vintage. 1920s. Classy. Nonchalant. Aura.
